summary: FORENSIC SOUNDBOARD TEST BLOCKED - Andre magic link authentication failed. Token was already consumed or expired. Unable to proceed with 100-turn consecutive conversation test.

authentication_attempt.reason: Magic link token was already consumed or expired
authentication_attempt.observed_behavior: Magic link redirected to https://biqc.ai/# (landing page) instead of authenticated session. Attempting to navigate to /soundboard resulted in redirect to /login-supabase

features_intended_to_test: Answer quality evaluation: relevance, continuity, non-hallucination, conversational quality, data grounding
Integration context validation: Outlook email/folders, Xero, HubSpot, calendar
Trinity mode vs Normal mode response quality
action_items: CRITICAL: Generate a fresh Andre magic link for testing agent (current link expired/consumed)
Alternative: Provide Andre's email/password credentials if magic link generation is not feasible
Ensure magic link is not consumed before testing agent uses it
context_for_next_testing_agent: Andre magic link provided was expired/consumed. Production target https://biqc.ai requires fresh authentication credentials. The 100-turn forensic Soundboard test cannot proceed without valid Andre session. Magic links are one-time use and have expiration windows.

evidence.screenshot_1: .screenshots/andre_auth_step1.png - Shows landing page after magic link redirect
evidence.screenshot_2: .screenshots/andre_soundboard_check.png - Shows login page when attempting to access /soundboard

question_sets_prepared: CEO/Founder: Strategic oversight questions on business health, market position, growth trajectory
CMO: Marketing effectiveness, campaign ROI, brand positioning, customer acquisition
CIO: Technology infrastructure, data security, integration health, system reliability
COO: Operational efficiency, process optimization, team productivity, resource allocation
CCO: Revenue performance, sales pipeline, customer retention, deal velocity
Legal: Compliance status, contract risks, regulatory exposure, audit readiness
Finance: Cash flow, margin analysis, AR/AP aging, budget variance

quality_criteria.relevance: Answer must directly address the question asked
quality_criteria.continuity: No forced repetition or circular responses
quality_criteria.non_hallucination: All facts must be grounded in actual data (HubSpot, Xero, Email, Calendar)
quality_criteria.conversational_quality: Natural, human-like tone without robotic phrasing
quality_criteria.data_grounding: Citations to specific integration data where applicable

forensic_test_protocol.failure_policy: If any single answer fails quality criteria, reset consecutive count to 0 and continue
